info.name: Prismix API
info.description: Prismix AI Gateway API collection. Includes admin AI management, relay, consumer gateway, and system endpoints.

item.name: Health & Metrics
item.description: Public health check and admin-only metrics endpoints.

request.description: Combined liveness + readiness check. Returns 200 when DB and Redis are reachable, 503 otherwise.
Prometheus exposition format metrics (public for scraping).
Full system metrics including DB stats, sessions, SSE listeners, AI streams, write queue, rate limiter, and memory usage. Admin auth required.

item.name: Admin Announcements
item.description: Announcement management endpoints (admin JWT auth). Compose drafts with category/severity/surface targeting, then send. Web-surface announcements broadcast via SSE; cli/model_error surfaces are injected into consumer relay responses on demand.

request.description: Paginated list of all announcements (drafts + sent). Returns { items, total }.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "gpt-4.1 deprecation",
  "body": "gpt-4.1 will be retired on July 31. Migrate to gpt-4.2.",
  "link": "https://docs.example.com/migration",
  "category": "model_retirement",
  "severity": "warning",
  "surfaces": ["web", "cli", "model_error"],
  "relatedModels": ["gpt-4.1", "gpt-4.1-*"],
  "startsAt": "2026-06-24T10:00:00.000Z",
  "expiresAt": "2026-07-31T23:59:59.000Z",
  "priority": 50
}

request.description: Create an announcement draft. category: general | model_retirement | model_pause | model_price_change | outage. severity: info | warning | critical. surfaces: one or more of web | cli | model_error (min 1). relatedModels: glob patterns (* suffix = prefix match); empty array = applies to all models. startsAt/expiresAt: optional ISO timestamps; expiresAt must be after startsAt. priority: -1000..1000, higher = shown first.
Update an existing announcement (draft or sent). All fields optional. Window validation (expiresAt after startsAt) merges with existing values.
Permanently delete an announcement. Cascades to delivery records.

Mark a draft as sent and trigger delivery. Emits a web SSE broadcast only when the announcement includes the 'web' surface; cli/model_error surfaces are injected into consumer relay responses on demand (not broadcast).

item.name: Admin AI
item.description: AI supplier, endpoint, upstream, model, and credential management endpoints. All require admin JWT.

item.name: Suppliers
item.description: AI supplier CRUD. Suppliers are the organizations that issue API credentials (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.). An endpoint references a supplier.

request.description: List all AI suppliers.
Create a new AI supplier. supplierId must be unique, lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens (1-50 chars). iconUrl is optional (pass empty string to clear). Returns 409 if supplierId already exists.
Update an existing AI supplier. All fields optional. Pass iconUrl as empty string to clear it.
Delete an AI supplier by internal numeric ID.

item.name: Endpoints
item.description: AI endpoint CRUD. Endpoints pair a supplier with a callable base URL, API format, and auth type. Auto-seeds default endpoints on first access.

request.description: List all AI endpoints with supplier info and upstream counts. Auto-seeds default endpoints on first access after a database reset.

Health overview for all endpoints. Returns totals (total/enabled/active/degraded) and per-endpoint stats: credential counts, upstream count, 24h request/error/token counts, error rate, and health status (healthy | degraded | idle | no-key | disabled | down | unknown).

Create a new AI endpoint. supplierId must reference an existing enabled supplier. endpointId must be unique, lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens (1-50 chars). apiFormat: openai | anthropic | gemini | azure-openai | bedrock. authType: bearer | api-key | sigv4 | cloudflare. upstreamRoutingStrategy: priority | weighted-random. officialConcurrencyLimit / officialQueueTimeoutMs optional.

Update an existing AI endpoint. All fields optional. Toggling enabled also clears autoDisabled, consecutiveFailures, lastError, and resets healthStatus to unknown. Invalidates routing and credential caches when relevant fields change.
Delete an AI endpoint. Invalidates routing and credential caches.
List all endpoint credentials bound to this endpoint, with redacted secret and enriched credential/upstream names.

item.name: Global Upstreams
item.description: Global AI upstream CRUD. Upstreams represent distinct API endpoints (e.g. official OpenAI, a reseller, OpenRouter). Endpoints are assigned to upstreams via the assignment endpoints.

request.description: List all global upstreams.

Create a new global upstream. upstreamId is auto-generated. kind: official | reseller | openrouter | custom (default: custom). baseUrl and modelsEndpoint are validated against SSRF (no private/internal addresses). concurrencyLimit and queueTimeoutMs optional. metadata must be under 4 KB.
Get upstream detail including its endpoint assignments (which endpoints use this upstream, with priority/weight/enabled per assignment).
Update an existing global upstream. All fields optional. Invalidates upstream routing cache and credential pools for all endpoints assigned to this upstream.
Delete a global upstream. Cascade-deletes assignments; keys bound to this upstream have upstreamId set to NULL.

Health overview for all upstreams. Returns totals (total/enabled/active/degraded) and per-upstream stats: assignmentCount, key counts, 24h request/error/token counts, error rate, health status (healthy | degraded | idle | no-key | disabled).
Recent usage logs for a specific upstream.

item.name: Endpoint Upstream Assignments
item.description: M:N endpoint-upstream assignment management. Assign shared upstreams to endpoints with per-assignment priority, weight, and enabled toggle.

request.description: List all upstream assignments for an endpoint. Each assignment includes the nested upstream object, priority, weight, and enabled status.

Assign a global upstream to an endpoint. upstreamId: numeric ID of an existing upstream. priority: 0-10000 (default 100, lower = higher priority). weight: 0-100 (default 1, for weighted-random strategy). Returns 409 if the upstream is already assigned to this endpoint.
Update an existing endpoint-upstream assignment. All fields optional. Invalidates upstream routing cache and credential pool for the endpoint.
Remove an upstream assignment from an endpoint. Invalidates routing and credential caches for the endpoint and affected upstream.

item.name: Models
item.description: AI model CRUD, discovery, and price sync.

request.description: List all models registered under an endpoint, including gray-release users.

query.description: official = hit endpoint.baseUrl; upstream = hit a bound upstream's baseUrl (default: official)

request.description: Fetch available models from the endpoint or a bound upstream. Requires at least one enabled endpoint credential. Returns models with registration status and LiteLLM pricing data.
Register a new model under an endpoint. Auto-creates a route to this endpoint. If the model already exists, only adds a route. Prices are per million tokens.
Batch create models for an endpoint (up to 500). Used by discover-and-add flow. Existing models get a route added; new models are created and routed.
Update an existing model. All fields optional.
Delete a model by its internal numeric ID.
Batch delete models by their internal numeric IDs.
Preview price changes from LiteLLM pricing catalog for an endpoint's models. Returns up to 200 diffs with old/new prices.
Apply selected price updates from LiteLLM catalog. Pass model internal IDs to update.

item.name: Credentials
item.description: AI credential (secret) CRUD. A credential is the real upstream API key issued by a supplier, stored encrypted at rest. Credentials are bound to endpoints via the endpoint-credential junction.

request.description: List all AI credentials (encrypted key and hash excluded). Enriched with supplier name and owner.

Create a new AI credential. supplierId must reference an existing enabled supplier. apiKey is AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest. ownerId optionally links the credential to a Key Provider for revenue share. Returns 409 if the apiKey hash already exists.
Update an existing AI credential. All fields optional. Invalidates credential pools for every endpoint this credential is bound to.
Delete an AI credential. Invalidates credential pools for every endpoint this credential was bound to.

item.name: Endpoint Credentials
item.description: Endpoint-credential junction CRUD. Binds a credential to a callable endpoint (optionally to a specific upstream) with routing weight. This is what the gateway actually draws from at request time.

request.description: List all endpoint credentials (encrypted key excluded). Enriched with endpoint, credential, supplier, and upstream names.

Bind a credential to an endpoint. endpointId and credentialId required. The credential's supplier must match the endpoint's supplier. upstreamId optional (null = use endpoint.baseUrl; if provided, the upstream must be assigned to the endpoint). weight: 0-100 (default 1).
Update an existing endpoint credential. All fields optional. If upstreamId changes, the new upstream must be assigned to the endpoint. Invalidates credential pools for the old and new bindings.
Delete an endpoint credential binding. Invalidates the credential pool for the affected endpoint.
Test an endpoint credential by hitting the upstream /models endpoint (or a probe chat call for Anthropic). Returns success status, latency in ms, and HTTP status code. Updates lastUsedAt on success.

item.name: Catalog
item.description: Aggregated model catalog across all enabled endpoints.

request.description: Get the aggregated model catalog across all enabled endpoints. Each entry includes model info, endpoint name, pricing, capabilities, and whether a credential is configured.

item.name: Usage & Logs
item.description: AI usage analytics, daily summaries, error overviews, and request log details.

request.description: Aggregated usage summary for a date range.
Paginated list of recent AI usage log entries with optional filters.
Daily usage summary for charts.
Error breakdown overview for the past N days.
Daily error counts for error trend charts.
Usage summary grouped by consumer key.
Get full request/response body for a specific request (Redis-backed, opt-in, time-limited).

item.name: Settings
item.description: AI gateway settings: request logging toggle and default markup.

request.description: Get the current request logging toggle state.
Enable or disable request/response body logging (stored in Redis).
Get the default markup percentage applied to consumer key billing.
Set the default markup percentage (0-1000). Resets in-memory cache immediately.

item.name: Admin AI Relay
item.description: OpenAI-compatible relay endpoints (admin JWT auth). Proxies requests to upstream providers with model fallback, key rotation, and cost tracking.

request.description: OpenAI-compatible GET /v1/models endpoint. Returns all enabled models in OpenAI list format.
OpenAI-compatible POST /v1/chat/completions. Supports streaming (stream: true), model fallback chains, input guardrails, semantic caching, and automatic cost tracking.

Generic passthrough for any /v1/* endpoint not matched by specific handlers (e.g. /v1/embeddings, /v1/messages). Forwards request body as-is to the upstream provider. Requires a 'model' field in the body.

item.name: Consumer Gateway
item.description: Consumer-facing AI gateway endpoints. Authenticated via ska_ consumer API keys (Bearer token). Includes balance gate, model ACL, and post-request billing.

request.description: OpenAI-compatible model list filtered by the consumer key's allowed models ACL.
Consumer chat completions with balance gate, model ACL, spending limits (per-pay, daily, monthly), guardrails, and automatic billing.
Consumer OpenAI-format passthrough for compatible /v1/* endpoints. Same billing and ACL as chat completions.
Anthropic-compatible model list filtered by the consumer key's allowed models ACL.
Consumer Anthropic Messages API with balance gate, model ACL, spending limits, and automatic billing.

item.name: Relay Consumer Keys
item.description: Admin management of consumer API keys (ska_ keys) for the AI gateway.

request.description: List consumer API keys with optional prefix and userUuid filters.
Get detail for a specific consumer key.
Create a new consumer API key. Returns the raw API key (only shown once). Optionally link to a userId for user-wallet billing. initialBalance credits the agent wallet on creation.
Update a consumer key. Can change name, status, markup, rate limit, allowed models, and agent assignment.
Reveal the full consumer API key (decrypted from storage).
Rotate the consumer API key. Generates a new key and invalidates the old one. Returns the new raw key.
Delete a consumer key.

item.name: User Portal
item.description: Merchant portal endpoints (merchant JWT auth via {{merchantToken}}). User-facing surfaces for the logged-in merchant.

request.description: Active web-surface announcements for the merchant (sent status, within startsAt/expiresAt window), ordered by priority then recency. Up to 10 returned.
